question: Will CPI rise more than 0.8% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has been officially released showing a 0.3% monthly increase, which is well below the 0.8% threshold required for a YES resolution. The market appears to be pricing in pre-release expectations rather than the actual reported data.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows 0.3% monthly CPI increase
